notes:
Bro Scores 1.9.6
• Much faster cold start — opens instantly on your cached scores
• Player profiles now show real World Cup stats (goals, saves, clean sheets) — live and tournament totals
• Fixed lineups: players no longer overlap, subs land in the right spot
• Tap a player in a match to see their key actions on the pitch
• Predict picks now show how all fans called each match
• New Settings menu; feedback is easy to find
• Team page is now tabbed: Matches, Players, Stats, News
